name: chain__made_3200_last_month_with_faceless_af
method: made $3,200 last month with faceless affiliate content (6 month breakdown). started doing this about 6 months ago after losing my job. didn't want to be on camera so i focused on faceless content. te

stages.task: scan affiliate networks (Impact, ShareASale, Amazon Associates, PartnerStack) for products matching faith/fitness/tech niches with >15% commission or >$20 per sale
generate 30 faceless content pieces (10 per niche) using hooks from CONTENT/social/WINNING_CONTENT_STRUCTURES.csv, each with embedded affiliate CTA
produce visual assets — Remotion for short-form video, image_factory for carousels, all faceless (text overlays, stock footage, screen recordings)
push to posting_queue with platform-specific formatting, generate buffer CSV imports for all 12 accounts
weekly affiliate revenue check via link shortener click data, update LEDGER/REVENUE_STREAMS_TRACKER.csv
